case_title: ESAYAS GEZEHEGNE VS. 175 TURK STREET GARAGE

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY GEZEHEGNE, ESAYAS CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEMS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF ESAYAS GEZEHEGNE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 175 TURK STREET GARAGE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HECTOR CASTRO (PARKING ATTENDANT) WITH WITNESS ANGEL CALDERON AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PILAR ESPINOZA (#330288). DEFENDANT STATED IN COURT THEIR CORRECT BUSINESS NAME IS NOT 175 TURK STREET GARAGE BUT IS CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEMS INC.. COURT AMENDS DEFENDANT NAME TO CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEMS INC IN THE SYSTEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEZEHEGNE, ESAYAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEMS INC. DEFENDANT PROVIDED PHOTOS AND VIDEO THAT SHOWED NOTICE OF PARKING FEE. IT WAS PLAINTIFF'S REFUSAL TO PAY THAT WHICH CAUSED HIS EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $40.(WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEZEHEGNE, ESAYAS AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEMS INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED MAR-13-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEMS INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY GEZEHEGNE, ESAYAS AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEMS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $40.(WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEZEHEGNE, ESAYAS AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEMS INC.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEZEHEGNE, ESAYAS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $40.(WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEZEHEGNE, ESAYAS AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEMS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO APR-04-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ESAYAS GEZEHEGNE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 175 TURK STREET GARAGE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HECTOR CASTRO, PARKING ATTENDANT. DEFENDANT REQUESTS IN COURT TO PROVIDE A SPANISH INTERPRETER. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES.
